plugins.name: content-engine
plugins.description: AI-powered content marketing pipeline for creating SEO-optimized blog articles. Research trending topics, create content briefs, write articles, validate quality, and analyze competitors — all through slash commands.

plugins.name: whatsapp-summarizer
plugins.description: Transcribe WhatsApp voice messages and photos using Gemini, then summarize conversations with Claude. Supports date filtering, clarifying context, and structured summaries.

plugins.name: ads-visual-fs
plugins.description: AI-powered ad creative generation for Funding Societies. Reimagine existing ads, refine elements, resize for platforms, and create from briefs — all with FS brand compliance built in.
